{{Quote|Lieutenant, order all squadrons to attack along the parabola programmed in. They are to stay in tight formation during the initial attack, and to return to the fleet as soon we have pulled within four arc seconds of the return path.|[[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Bevven]]|<ref name="PVFtT" />}}
The '''Raid on Picutorion''' was part of the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]]. When [[Picutorion/Legends|Picutorion]] aligned itself with Rebels in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], the Empire responded by attacking the world.

==Prelude==
Commodore [[Bevven]] was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and in charge of the fleet ant [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] used in the attack; the ground forces were commanded by [[High Colonel/Legends|High Colonel]] [[Theol Drost]].<ref name="PVFtT" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|We have been monitoring the progress of the offensive and have noted the elements which have actually penetrated the tracking station include two tagged as sensitive.|ISB agent [[Mar Barezz]]|<ref name="PVFtT" />}}
During the assault of a [[tracking station]], an [[Battalion/Legends#Armor battalion|armor battalion]] of [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Tensiger]]'s [[6th regiment]] managed to penetrated the Rebel perimeter despite heated
resistance. [[Imperial Army trooper/Legends|Imperial troopers]], including [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ganig]] and [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Stecker]], entered the station but they were attacked by Rebel [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]].<ref name="PVFtT" />

[[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Mar Barezz|Barezz]] forced Drost to sacrifice Ganig and Stecker in the assault, since both men were suspected Rebel sympathizers, despite being heroes of the [[Battle of Sagma]].<ref name="PVFtT" />

After ten minutes of fight and the death of all the unit in the station, Commodore Bevven launched [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] to intercept the Y-wings.<ref name="PVFtT" />

==Aftermath==
After the battle, the remaining Rebels forces tried to evacuate the planet. A Rebel squad was eliminated in [[Picutorion's spaceport]] by a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit led by [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]].<ref name="Valance1" />
